Release 1.1.1
  • macOS arm64

النموذجpackages
نظام الأنواعstatic · type-first
الهدفRust → native
الرخصةMIT

abstractus

Translation status: العربية reader-locale proof. Code fences render through the ar pipeline; prose is canonical Latin.

Marks a type or member as abstract.

Syntax: abstractus genus <name> <block>

Category

type

Related

  • genus
  • implendum

Examples

examples/corpus/abstractus/abstractus.fab (canonical · keyword)

Marks a type or member as abstract.

# =============================================================================
# abstractus — Marks a type or member as abstract.
# =============================================================================
#
# What this teaches:
#   • Abstract type declaration — `abstractus genus` defines a type that
#     requires concrete subtypes to provide member implementations
#   • Inheritance and override — concrete genera extend abstract ones and
#     supply their own `functio` bodies
#
# Common mistakes:
#   • forgetting to provide concrete `functio` implementations for abstract methods declared in `abstractus genus`
#
# See also: genus, implendum
# =============================================================================

# abstractus — abstract genus contract marker
#
# abstractus genus Nomen { … }
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   genusDecl :← 'abstractus'? 'genus' ident '{' ... '}'
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   rota, 16

abstractus genus Figura {
    textus nomen

    functio titulus() → textus {
        redde "§"(ego.nomen)
    }
}

genus Circulus {
    textus nomen
    numerus radius = 1

    functio area() → numerus {
        redde ego.radius * ego.radius
    }
}

incipit {
    fixum _ c ← Circulus { nomen = "rota", radius = 4 }
    nota c.nomen
    nota c.area()
}

Expected output:

rota
16
المصادر
  • ["examples/corpus/abstractus/abstractus.fab"]
